name: WinBolo
description: A multiplayer top-down tank game for up to 16 players. Capture bases and pillboxes, harvest trees, build roads and walls, lay mines, and battle for control of the island. The Macintosh classic, rebuilt for modern platforms — free, open source, and cross-platform across desktop, mobile, and web.

name: The Wackytown Game
description: Survive 14 waves of escalating absurdity. Defend the base, bank the cash, buy stupid upgrades. Bring a friend if you're brave.

name: Quacky
description: Meet your digital duck: feed it, play with it and watch it age. Earn drops with time, trade them on the marketplace, and endlessly optimize your device for maximum quack efficiency.

name: REWIND
description: 《REWIND》 is a hardcore text-based detective puzzle game containing nearly a hundred clues. Players need to carefully examine and deduce the clues to find the answer to the case.

name: Oblivion Maiden
description: An exploration adventure set in St. Dorothia Academy, a magical educational institution hidden deep within a forest. A story that begins with an encounter with a girl named Lulunya, and unfolds through mysterious phenomena and dream worlds.

name: At Run Time
description: At Run Time is a first-person parkour game focused on speed, precision, and risk-taking. After stealing an energy source from a smuggler’s hideout, escape through deadly traps using advanced movement skills before time runs out.

name: BomBee
description: BomBee is a free-to-play online skill PvP arcade about honey-bomb combo timing. Ranked: up to 4-player free-for-all (FFA) in ~3 min. Custom: solo practice or 2–4 players, FFA or teams. Grid blasts + free movement on one map. Cosmetics only; dedicated-server fairness.
anti_cheat: Server-authoritative gameplay validation (no client anti-cheat software)
anti_cheat_note: Server-authoritative gameplay validation (no client anti-cheat software) [Non-Kernel]
notes: Server-authoritative gameplay validation (no client anti-cheat software) [Non-Kernel]

name: Toy's Dream
description: Toy’s Dream is a cute and wholesome puzzle-platformer. You are a Hero, who sets out on a journey to save the town that has been attacked by the Demon Lord. He must overcome many obstacles along the way, using glue and thread...

name: Desktop Driller
description: An idle game that runs while you work. Your activity powers the drill: dig, earn, upgrade and go deeper. Build your system, automate everything and reach the center of the Earth.

name: Haunt Out
description: A voodoo ritual has gone wrong… Trapped in a haunted Louisiana mansion, play as both a voodoo priest and a mischievous spirit. Use powerful magic to hunt or escape, set traps, and wreak havoc in a tense, strategic VR duel

name: JAYWALK: An Endless Arcade Hopper Game
description: Hop, dodge, and race to the top in this endless runner inspired by Frogger! Collect coins, unlock new characters, and compete with friends in fast-paced multiplayer chaos.

name: NomNom Treasure Hunt
description: NomNom Treasure Hunt is a cozy exploration game for kids where players clean and organize rooms to unlock fun rewards. Discover hidden treasures, complete simple tasks, and explore charming worlds inspired by adventure games in a safe, playful experience.

name: EVEN OR ODD 1
description: "Even? Odd? Forget the math!" Enter the Collatz Conjecture—mathematics' greatest unsolved mystery—reimagined as a high-speed roguelike action game. Play as "Ichi," the muscle-brained magical girl, teleporting between lanes to smash back incoming numbers with charge shots!

name: This Game is Simple
description: Wander through an ever-changing level in This Game is Simple- a quiet, meditative story about a game developer losing passion towards their work.

name: Desktop Snail Assassin
description: A idle desktop snails-like. Every now and then the murderous snail assassin is hunting your mouse cursor, turning your desktop into a chaotic bullet hell. How long can you survive?!

name: StyxVenture
description: A hand-drawn RPG set in a little corner of Hell - a very monochrome place. Master the seven Sins, face off against a variety of demons (and other creatures) and find your way to freedom!

name: Incrementoad
description: Eat bugs, gain power, and restore the frogs to their former glory! In Incrementoad, a cozy incremental clicker, you collect t̶o̶a̶d̶s frogs, unlock godlike powers, attract crazier bugs to your pond, master deep upgrade trees, and uncover ancient secrets. Can you master this short, addictive journey?

name: Finding Lake Chewaucan
description: You’re a time-traveling detective with a bone to uncover. Hunt for clues, solve puzzles and complete minigames to unlock pieces of the past and identify fossil animals.

name: Fabricatio
description: Build efficient production lines, automate resource transport, and master complex logistics in a 2D factory-building experience focused purely on automation.

name: The Naysayer
description: Disprove the accusations a seditious knight has brought against your rule. Find a way to defeat your foe in the arena, or refute his words in this text-based souls-like.

name: Interaktivně o Liberci
description: A first-person interactive film where you decide how the day unfolds during a visit to Liberec with someone you haven’t seen in ages. Choose your path, shape the experience — and be careful. One wrong choice might end everything.

name: The Colors of Love - Re-Colored
description: A romantic visual novel about connection, choices, and the colors of the heart. Features an animated Live2D love interest, multiple endings, English and Spanish support, Steam achievements, and hidden secrets to uncover.

name: One Death at a Time
description: One Death at a Time is a first-person exploration game. You play as John, in the middle of a midlife crisis. A suspicious milk carton offers you a wish in exchange for 14 souls… but because you're a good person, you'll have to die yourself and explore the city in search of 14 ways to do it.

name: Econosquare
description: Econosquare is a persistent financial MMOE where players trade global assets, read macro signals, complete client contracts, found companies, manage banks and compete for influence inside a living economy shaped by markets, credit, crises and player decisions.

name: Godius Eternal War
description: A classic 2D pixel MMORPG inspired by the golden age of online RPGs. Join nation wars, explore an open multiplayer world, trade with players, battle in PvP, and experience a community-driven adventure that has continued since 1999.

name: Ocean Planet
description: Button and Drop Bear live rent-free above their friend's steam bun shop. When their friend goes missing, it's up to them to figure out what happened and bring them home.

name: Touhou Defense Tale ~ AI Test in Touhou ~
description: A 2D Touhou fan game combining tower defense, tower merging, RTS-style control, and chaotic bullet-filled battles. Merge Touhou characters, build your defense, and compete for the fastest clear time on the leaderboard.

name: Seven Rounds
description: Parry to reload. A neon top-down roguelite where every bullet is earned — deflect attacks to refill your revolver, chain perfect parries for slow-motion charged shots, and survive an endless swarm of geometric foes. No parry, no bullets.

name: Gods and Kings
description: A game that combines real-time strategy, card collection and role-playing. It's based on Greek mythology. You can play as heroes who can manipulate the power of Rune, summon the army and cast magic to defeat enemies, challenge or defend the authority of the Gods.

name: The Tartarus Loop
description: Play as a copy of Theseus. Run around in a maze, having to defeat the very Minotaur in Tartarus after it perished by the hands of the original Theseus. Over and over again. The soul of the Minotaur can't rest. All it can do is chase the player and try to outsmart you.

name: Unquiet Grey
description: You can't save him... but what if you could meet him again? Unquiet Grey is a heartbreaking timeloop visual novel about a troubled young woman and the kind-hearted musician she loves through countless lifetimes.

name: Solderia - Fall of Kings
description: Build your kingdom, train armies, forge alliances, and fight for the throne in Solderia: Fall of Kings, a medieval strategy game where every decision shapes your rise to power.

name: Lil' Quests
description: Where every Quest ends in Laughs and Chaos. Lil' Quests is a sandbox, adventure, co-op game with wacky physics, funny moments, and horses!

name: Dungeon Dilemma
description: A Dungeon Builder and Crawler Roguelike where you can construct your own dungeon or raid one designed by your friends. Vie for victory, defeat minions, and evade traps as a party of up to 4 Challengers, or create the most diabolical dungeon imaginable as the Dungeon Boss!

name: Till Midnight
description: TILL MIDNIGHT is a narrative-driven management simulation game with world-shattering consequences, inspired by true historical events. Navigate a darkly atmospheric vessel gripped by critical communication failures, trapped hundreds of meters below the surface.

name: Eyes of the Forest
description: A third-person stealth adventure set in a quiet, post-human woodland where survival depends on patience, observation, and restraint. Towering ruins, tangled roots, and dimly lit paths create an environment where every movement matters and safety is never guaranteed.

name: Battle Live! The Idol School Collection
description: Welcome to Pride Park! Experience six main stories and several bonus stories centered around the staff and students of this eclectic idol school in this episodic, slice-of-life visual novel!

name: Starmageddon
description: Break the rules and join the fight in Starmageddon! A high-octane, team-based, online multiplayer space shooter, where survival is not enough. Dominate the battlefield through teamwork, split-second decisions and constant action!

name: Count Down
description: Count Dracula is going Down

name: Curling
description: Build a deck of curling stones with abilities so broken they should be illegal. Face random opponents in the tour with or without friends. A roguelike deckbuilder unlike anything else.

name: Glisynth
description: Glisynth is a rhythm game that uses two types of notes. The Q row on the keyboard is used for yellow notes, while the A row is used for white notes.

name: Deadly Obsession
description: A psychological horror visual novel where you’re kidnapped by an obsessed captor—your choices determine whether you escape or fall into his twisted love.

name: The Button Maze
description: Collect all the Sewing Buttons in each Level before time runs out and the "Entity" gets you!

name: Geckos & Deckos
description: There are four lizards at this table, but only one pirate can leave victorious. Play your cards strategically and blow up your rivals. Don't forget to sling your tail at your friends' heads (because it's funny). Can you manage to take the helm?

name: Swordsmith of Greyhaven
description: Run a weaponsmith shop in dark medieval city of Greyhaven. Sell weapons, manage gold, debt, materials, and fame, while customers, beggars, bandits, and rumors reveal the consequences of every choice.

name: Lord Of The Trough
description: LOTT is about getting to the desired girth and claiming the superior oats. Enjoy the pastures of Svinwald with up to 5 other players. Live to impress the tall skinny ones. Compete in a range of mini-games to determine the superior pig. Serve up a range of undesirable slop to your ungirthed brothers.

name: REMinal
description: REMinal is a non-euclidean, procedurally-generated horror game. Run from your shadows, seek out cursed curios, and build safe spaces in an endlessly sprawling house. Can you escape with your soul intact?

name: Nano CODE:X
description: A small 2D game where you sneak through a lab simulation, collect parts, and rebuild your drone companion with multiple possible looks.

name: Food Idle
description: In Food Idle, build the ultimate automated kitchen! Discover over 2000 ingredients and dishes as you level up, earn gold, and expand your operation!

name: Impulse Response
description: Engineer Cadence Quinn wakes from cryo sleep to blaring alarms. What happened to the crew? What's wrong with the ship? Use echolocation to navigate the darkness, solve the puzzles and uncover the mystery... A first person, blind accessible audio only experience.

name: Saga Onirica: Angelic Engine
description: Saga Onirica: Angelic Engine is a top-down shooter featuring experimental control schemes and mechanics, where you fight endless waves of demons by crafting the ultimate loadout from firearms, magic spells, and advanced technology.

name: Outta Space
description: Where is your cat flying right now? Outta Space is an idle game where a tiny cat explores the universe from your desktop corner. Every keystroke, every click fuels the spaceship. From the Moon, past the solar system, to distant stars. Come back and see how far your lovely cat has gone.

name: Never Ending Hero RPG
description: Never Ending Hero RPG is a free-to-play idle action RPG where your hero's stats grow without limit. Explore zone maps, auto-fight monsters, upgrade gear at the Mystic Armory, and prestige for permanent bonuses. Optional gem packs. A free account enables cloud saves.

name: Captain Soda Prologue
description: Transform into the ultimate pop bottle hero, obliterating an alien army with your sparkling soda guns! Captain Soda is a fizzy arcade platform shooter boasting soda flavors with unique abilities, powerful upgrades, and pulse-pounding challenges. Chemical warfare just got refreshing.

name: Soccerboy vs Aliens
description: Play as Soccerboy, a plucky little soccer fanatic in this 2D action, puzzle platformer. Honing your ball skills, you must take on an alien invasion to save the galaxy and your soccer idol Bro-naldo, in this fun take on the platforming genre.

name: Depths
description: Depths is a cooperative multiplayer game where you and up to three friends​ delve into procedurally generated caves, collecting items,​ going deeper, making sure to meet quota every dive. Avoid the monsters that dwell in these caverns​ if you and your friends hope to make it out alive.​

name: Guard Her
description: A classic tower defense game. Build 6 unique towers, upgrade them to level 3, and convert them into support towers. Strategically place towers to redirect enemy paths. Defend against Normal, Fast, Tank enemies and a Boss every 10 waves. 5 difficulty levels, full keyboard controls, save & load.

name: Kinetic TwinZ
description: In this Motion Control party game, turn volleyball into an act of defiance! Seize your Joy-Cons, dodge powerful attacks, and coordinate with your duo to defeat the "Anti-Fun" police.

name: Mini Raid Leader
description: Mini Raid Leader is a single-player Action RTS, in which you command an ever-growing party of heroes to take down powerful bosses.
